headline: HCA Healthcare (HCA) Reports Q1 2026 Financial Growth With $19.1B in Revenue
summary: HCA Healthcare Inc. (NYSE:HCA) is one of the most undervalued large cap stocks to buy according to analysts. On April 24, HCA Healthcare reported financial results for Q1 2026, featuring revenues of $19.109 billion, a 4.3% increase over the previous year. Net income rose slightly to $1.620 billion, while diluted EPS grew by 10.9% to […]
